subject: Meet BehaviorSchool Pro: Live Demo This Week
previewText: See our new platform in action and get your questions answered.
body:
Hi [Name],

I'm excited to invite you to a live demo of our new platform, BehaviorSchool Pro.

If you're a school-based BCBA, school psychologist, or special education administrator, this demo is for you.

I'll be walking you through the entire platform, from creating a new student profile to generating a comprehensive, data-driven Behavior Intervention Plan. You'll see how BehaviorSchool Pro can help you:

*   **Save time on paperwork and administrative tasks.**
*   **Improve the quality and consistency of your BIPs.**
*   **Collaborate more effectively with teachers and parents.**

I'll also be answering your questions live. This is a great opportunity to see the platform in action and learn how it can help you and your district.

The demo is this [Day of the Week] at [Time].

[Link to Register for the Demo]

I hope to see you there!

Sincerely,

Rob Spain, BCBA
